news.title: CZ says SBF asked for billions 'like a Bologna sandwich' as FTX collapsed
news.summary: In his new memoir, Changpeng Zhao reveals he signed the FTX letter of intent as a formality and calls Caroline Ellison's $22 floor price offer a "fatal mistake."

news.title: Bitcoin vaults past $72,000 as U.S. stock futures surge on a two‑week U.S.–Iran ceasefire
news.summary: Risk assets rose late Tuesday as oil collapsed after Trump and Iran confirmed the two-week ceasefire.

news.title: Bitcoin rises past $69,000 as risk markets reverse big early losses on hope for Iran deal
news.summary: Iran's government is reportedly reviewing Pakistan's request for a two-week ceasefire positively, according to an Axios report.
